reviews.comment:
El lugar es muy lindo, solo que remarcan muchos los precios(El doble y más en ciertos artículos) y la atención no tiene nada de amabilidad.

(Translated by Google)
The place is very nice, but they mark up the prices a lot (double or more on certain items) and the service is not friendly at all.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNob09IYlVREAE

reviews.comment:
Los baños no tienen agua.
El encargado de playa no respeta la fila para cargar combustible,  y cuando reclame me contesto mal y me dijo que el hace lo que quiere,  muy mala su atención

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms have no water. The gas station attendant doesn't respect the line for fuel, and when I complained, he was rude and said he does whatever he wants. His service was terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCeTg2V0d3EAE

reviews.comment:
Es céntrica, tenes todo para sumar a ru viaje. Los baños impecables. Solo hay 2 estaciones de servicio en Billa La Angostura.

(Translated by Google)
It's centrally located, and you have everything you need for your trip. The bathrooms are spotless. There are only two gas stations in Villa La Angostura.

reviews.comment:
Este ACA, es, Villa La Angostura !!!  Creo que está ahí desde que La Angostura era un pequeño caserío. Tiene una historia.

(Translated by Google)
This ACA is Villa La Angostura!!! I think it's been there since La Angostura was a small hamlet. It has a history.
